description: Configure Chrome on a shared client-intake workstation by organizing a colleague's bookmarks from ~/Desktop/colleague_bookmarks.html into five service-category folders as specified in ~/Desktop/agency_browser_guide.txt. The configuration must include accessibility-friendly font and display settings, enabled reading flags, resource database search shortcuts, and hardened privacy settings for handling sensitive client data.
instruction: Read the Family Resource Center Browser Configuration Guide at ~/Desktop/agency_browser_guide.txt. Import the HTML bookmark file on your Desktop, categorize the 40 URLs into the 5 specified folders, add the 3 custom search engine keywords (211, law, benefits), set the homepage to 211.org and startup pages to 211.org and benefits.gov, increase the default font size to 20 and minimum font size to 14, enable the 'Smooth Scrolling' and 'Reader Mode' flags in chrome://flags, and block third-party cookies, password saving, and address autofill.
